data.title: METAMORPHOSIS
data.description:
A complete brand identity for METAMORPHOSIS, an avant-garde fashion house that rejects seasonal collections in favour of continuous evolution. The identity system is built to mutate — no two applications look the same, yet they are unmistakably from the same origin.

We developed a generative logo system driven by a custom algorithm that responds to time, location, and context. The wordmark shifts its letterforms with every render, creating a living identity that mirrors the brand's philosophy of perpetual transformation.

The system spans packaging, digital presence, spatial design for their Copenhagen flagship, and a bespoke typeface — Morphe Sans — with 12 optical axes.

images.alt: Brand identity system in use across print materials
Flagship store interior with generative brand elements
